infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Item Scanner needs camera access to scan receipts, products, and food items for budget analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Item Scanner needs photo library access to select images of receipts, products, and deals.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Item Scanner uses your location to find nearby stores and deals in your area.
